## Description

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] chore / refactor / docs / test / ci / build

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] The branch is short-lived and will be **squash**-merged (linear history)
